flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at American Jewish University rose 30% between 2007 and 2010 ($12.5k → $16.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 28 pp at American Jewish University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (30.8% vs 58.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at American Jewish University rose 15% between 2007 and 2010 ($21.3k → $24.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at American Jewish University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (50.0% → 44.4%).
